summary: Tested Daily Sales Target System feature. All backend tests passed (10/10). Frontend UI tests verified: Admin can see and edit target, Cashier can view but not edit target, Cash register shows 4 summary cards, Confirm button correctly disabled when expected_cash > 0 and counted_cash = 0.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: POST /api/sales-target returns 200 for admin, 403 for cashier
VERIFIED: GET /api/sales-target returns has_target, target_amount, current_sales, progress, achieved fields
VERIFIED: Dashboard shows sales-target-card with data-testid='sales-target-card'
VERIFIED: Admin sees 'تعديل الهدف' button with data-testid='edit-target-btn'
VERIFIED: Cashier does NOT see edit target button (correctly hidden)
VERIFIED: Target dialog has input with data-testid='target-amount-input' and save button with data-testid='save-target-btn'
VERIFIED: Cash register dialog shows 4 summary cards (إجمالي المبيعات, نقدي, المصاريف, المتوقع)
VERIFIED: Confirm button disabled when expected_cash > 0 AND counted_cash = 0
VERIFIED: Leaderboard API returns correct structure (period, date, leaderboard[], total_cashiers)
seed_data_creation: Sales target set to 50000 IQD for today via API
context_for_next_testing_agent: Daily Sales Target System fully implemented and tested. Admin can set/modify target via POST /api/sales-target. All users can view target progress via GET /api/sales-target. Cashier correctly cannot edit target. Cash register close button behavior verified - disabled when expected_cash > 0 and counted_cash = 0. Leaderboard shows when there's sales data.

verified_features.description: Admin/Manager can set daily sales target, Cashier gets 403
Returns target progress data for all authenticated users

test_results.response_structure: PASS - has_target, target_amount, current_sales, progress, achieved

verified_features.description: Admin sees edit button, Cashier does not

test_results.cashier_hidden: PASS - Button not visible for cashier

verified_features.description: Dialog with input field and save button

test_results.confirm_disabled: PASS - Disabled when expected > 0 and counted = 0

test_results.ui_visibility: INFO - Not visible when no sales (empty leaderboard)

test_results.trigger_logic: PASS - Shows when achieved=true and not yet celebrated

ui_tests.admin_target_dialog: PASSED - Input and save button found
ui_tests.confirm_button_disabled: PASSED - Disabled when counted=0 and expected>0
